goals: Show slot availability clearly before the user attempts a booking
Make login and booking possible from the same page
Use strong visual separation between available, held, and maintenance states

visualDirection.base: clean slate surfaces with aquatic accents
visualDirection.tone: practical, modern, and easy to scan on mobile and desktop

interactionPrinciples: Status should be visible before the user clicks into details
Booking should fail loudly and clearly when a slot is held by another user
A successful booking should expose the hold expiry time to the user
currentGaps: no backend-managed http-only session for route protection
no dedicated loading or error route patterns
